Name: USGS The National Map
Caveats: Physical screening only; not survey-grade; check product metadata, scale, accuracy, source date, and third-party notices

Name: FEMA NFHL
Caveats: Effective NFHL screening only; not all flood risk; official use requires FEMA standards and proper base-map accuracy; cite FEMA and state non-endorsement

Name: USDA Web Soil Survey/SSURGO
Caveats: Screening only; not a substitute for site-specific soil, septic, engineering, or permitting review; cite USDA/NRCS and preserve survey/refresh metadata

Name: National Wetlands Inventory
Caveats: Screening only; not jurisdictional delineation, Clean Water Act, permitting, or buildability determination; cite USFWS/NWI and preserve metadata/published-date/project caveats

Name: USGS Water Data APIs
Caveats: Monitoring proximity may be a weak proxy; provisional data subject to revision; no water-rights or well-viability conclusions

Name: EPA ECHO
Caveats: Nearby regulated facility does not prove subject-property contamination; ECHO data may lag source by up to three months; robotic queries prohibited

Name: BLM MLRS
Caveats: Does not resolve private mineral rights

Name: USGS MRDS
Caveats: Systematic updates ceased; treat as historical screening

Name: National Zoning Atlas
Caveats: Coverage incomplete

Name: County GIS parcels
Caveats: Parcel screening only; not a survey, title determination, or buildability finding; cite per-county GIS and retrieval date; no owner or value fields exposed; private-MVP scope: Buncombe/Chatham/Brunswick NC reviewed approved-with-restrictions; Chatham live connector active; Buncombe and Brunswick connector implementation pending; other counties NOT_EVALUATED

Name: County assessor
Use: Assessed value, tax year, situs address, PIN
Caveats: Assessed value is a tax-administration artifact effective as of reappraisal date; NOT a market appraisal, lender appraisal, or lending-suitability indicator; owner/PII fields suppressed; machine-access terms not reviewed; private-MVP uses NOT_EVALUATED sentinel path; no live connector; scope: Buncombe/Chatham/Brunswick NC

Name: County recorder
Caveats: Often manual/search-limited

Name: State well logs
Caveats: May not prove viability

Name: State water rights
Caveats: Complex and jurisdiction-specific

Name: State geological survey
Caveats: Varies by state

Name: OpenStreetMap/Overture
Caveats: Not authoritative for legal access

Name: Commercial parcel vendor
Caveats: License/cost blocker; private-MVP: not required (commercial parcel vendor deferred; public/official county sources and NOT_EVALUATED sentinels sufficient for private MVP utility proof)

Name: Commercial comps/listings vendor
Caveats: License/cost/export blocker

Name: Commercial zoning vendor
Caveats: Must verify with official local sources

Name: NOAA climate/weather
Caveats: Not full forward-looking parcel risk

Name: FCC Broadband Map
Caveats: Coverage/provider claims may need verification

Name: Census TIGER/ACS
Caveats: Fair housing care

Name: Local zoning ordinance PDFs
Caveats: Hard to parse; source/date caveats; private-MVP: selected-county source; zoning fixture connector (StaticZoningFixtureConnector) covers this domain for private MVP regression

Name: Title company/manual report
Caveats: External professional source

Name: Surveyor/manual report
Caveats: External professional source
